documentation.content: The synthetic HTTPS check at /health on the backend is failing from multiple regions. Distinguish from the liveness-probe alert: this fires on external reachability (TLS, DNS, LB, routing) whereas the liveness probe is internal to Cloud Run. If both fire together the service itself is down; if only this fires, suspect DNS/load-balancer/cert issues. Metric source: monitoring.googleapis.com/uptime_check/check_passed on the backend uptime check.

conditions.displayName: Uptime check failing from 2+ regions for 2m
